objective: Shadow-mode walk-forward diagnostics; does not overwrite factor_weights.yaml.

methodology.normalization: uses existing as-of directional_score; optimizer does not refit full-sample normalization
methodology.full_history_note: optimized weights fit on all visible history are full-history diagnostic only, not out-of-sample verified

factor_availability.data_source: Market-data futures open interest: IF.CFE oi
iFinD funding rate series: DR007.IB 5-day change
iFinD EDB spread: CGB30Y - CGB10Y using L001618299 and L001619604
Derived proxy from ETF amount until real margin balance is connected
Market-data overseas daily prices: 80% SPX.GI, 10% N225.GI, 10% KS11.GI
Market-data overseas high-low range proxy: 80% SPX.GI, 10% N225.GI, 10% KS11.GI
Market-data A-share daily open and close prices: SSE50, CSI300, STAR 50, ChiNext
Market-data A-share daily volume: SSE50, CSI300, STAR 50, ChiNext

violations: ETF flow + margin proxy exceeds cap 15.00%
ETF flow + margin proxy exceeds cap 15.00%

checks.name: next_day_return_shift_minus_one_contract
checks.note: market_return is the realized return on signal date; because factors require data_date < signal date, this is equivalent to a next-day target from the factor data date.

checks.name: full_history_optimized_weights_warning
checks.warning: optimized weights are full-history diagnostic only, not out-of-sample verified

warnings: optimized weights fit on all visible history are full-history diagnostic only, not out-of-sample verified

recommendation.can_this_optimizer_improve_return_predic: No. Out-of-sample direction hit rate is not above 52%.
recommendation.can_this_optimizer_improve_risk_filterin: Yes, risk filtering is useful, but crash prediction is limited.
recommendation.should_any_weight_be_adopted_into_produc: No. Nothing should be adopted into production automatically.
recommendation.risk_filter_note: Model behaves more like a broad risk filter than a crash predictor.
do: Use constrained_blended_weights only as a shadow candidate.
Require manual approval before editing configs/factor_weights.yaml.
do_not: Do not interpret high abs IC with negative mean IC as return predictive power.
Do not treat small-sample strong signal hit rates as stable.
